_doc: Shared-AcroForm-field splits (accessibility + correctness). Each listed field is one AcroForm field reused across semantically different boxes; detach the wrong-context appearance so it stops inheriting the other box's value and gets its own /TU. Verified via sentinel render. The other 13 worklist collisions across CR-140/CR-JV-253/CV-067/FM-040-A/JV-005/OTH-123 are benign (same value legitimately repeated in caption+body or across page headers, or unmapped cosmetic) — no split needed.

splits._why: 2_5 = child-DOB table cell (pg4) AND confidential 'Mailing address' line (pg12); pg12 detached + blanked.
2_6 = child-2 address table cell (pg4) AND a Protective-Custody case-detail field (pg14); pg14 detached + blanked.
